01
Key Benefits
Our Own Office in Chicago
  • Physical office in Chicago — a sign of stability and transparency.
  • Walk in any time with questions — from paperwork to technical issues.
  • Not every carrier has a real office. Ours sets us apart.
Experienced Ownership
  • 8+ years in car hauling — starting with hands-on truck repair.
  • Understand the operation from the inside — drivers' and brokers' needs alike.
  • Experience reflected in how the company is structured and managed.
Reputation & 100% Broker Rating
  • 100% broker rating maintained since launch — 1.5 years running.
  • Priority dispatch from many brokers + access to private load boards.
  • Result of consistent performance and a reliable fleet.
In-House Dispatch Team
  • Own dispatch — no third-party services that don't know our processes.
  • Faster communication, tighter coordination, better load planning.
Competitive Pay — 30% of Gross
  • Drivers earn 30% of gross — competitive rate in today's market.
  • High average gross via direct yard and factory contracts.
  • Experienced driver pool improves efficiency and safety.
24/7 Safety Manager Support
  • Safety manager reachable even outside regular business hours.
  • Breakdown or tough situation on the road — we help find a solution.
  • Raises driver safety and confidence on every route.
Modern & Growing Fleet
  • 30 trucks and consistently adding new equipment.
  • Work with both company trucks and owner-operator equipment.
  • Rapid fleet growth reflects stability and momentum.
Full Administrative Support
  • IFTA filings, IRP plates, and all required documentation.
  • Fuel cards provided for driver convenience.
  • Management always reachable to handle questions and support the team.
Consistent Freight
  • Direct yard and factory contracts — drivers never sit without a load.
  • Steady work and clear route planning every week.
Transparent Pay — No Hidden Deductions
  • No hidden deductions. No payment delays.
  • All settlements open — drivers see full gross and every line item.
Roadside Technical Support
  • Breakdown? We help locate the nearest shop or towing service.
  • Company may cover minor repair costs in force majeure situations.
  • Safety manager available around the clock.
Flexible Routes & Fuel Cards
  • Routes built around driver preferences — states, directions, days off.
  • Fuel cards with discounts at major truck stop networks across the U.S.
  • Meaningfully reduces costs and increases real net income per trip.
02
About the Company
Miliva Inc is a Chicago-based car hauling carrier. Our owners have been in the industry for over 8 years — starting with truck repair and working through every stage of the business. The company launched 1.5 years ago and has since maintained a 5★ rating, expanded rapidly, and continues to grow its fleet.
03
Rates & Specs
ItemDetails
Gross · 3-car 50–56 ft$10,000 – $12,000 / week
Gross · 3-car 59 ft$11,000 – $13,000 / week
Gross · 5-car$12,500 – $16,000 / week
Gross · 7-car$13,000 – $19,000 / week
Driver Rate30% of gross (28% for first 30 days). Increase reviewed by mutual agreement.
Miles Per WeekApprox. 5,000 miles
Pay ScheduleWeekly — paid the following week after the completed run
Fleet Size30 trucks
Truck TypesFreightliner Cascadia 2022–2023, Volvo VNL 2020
Trailer TypesBuckeye 4-car (new, mostly off the lot), 5 trailers from 2020, 1 Sun Country
LogbookWe work with logbook providers — BOLs and ELD compliance handled
SupportSafety manager after hours — breakdowns and shop referrals
